'''''Yaai''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] belonging to the Rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].

The ship, along with [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Thinin]]'' and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']] was part of Zaarin's attempt to capture [[Missile Boat]]s that [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] attempted to use as bait to trap Zaarin. However because the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Whirlwind (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Whirlwind'']] was stalled by a surprise ambush the trap failed to pin down Zaarin. However the attempt to capture the missile boats had failed and among the losses Zaarin suffered were also his support Cruiser ''Yaai'' by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
